data.title: Aon increases Data Center Lifecycle Insurance Program to $2.5 billion, enhancing resilience for digital infrastructure.
data.description: A professional services firm, Aon plc (NYSE: AON), based in Dublin, revealed on January 14, 2026, its decision to boost its exclusive Data Center Lifecycle Insurance Program (DCLP) by $1 billion, bringing the total capacity of the program to $2.5 billion. This significant expansion aims to cater to an increased demand for...

data.title: Manus incorporates Similarweb's 12-month web traffic data into its Meta-owned AI platform for competitor analysis.
data.description: Manus has recently incorporated 12 months of web traffic data from Similarweb into its AI agent platform. This integration allows for automated competitor analysis and market research to be conducted efficiently.

data.title: Barrows Connected Store names James Hay as Global CEO, overseeing teams in UK, US, and South Africa from January 1, 2026.
data.description: In London today, Barrows Connected Store, a prominent company in connected retail experiences, revealed the selection of James Hay as Global Chief Executive Officer starting from January 1, 2026. Taking on this position, Hay will oversee the worldwide operations of Barrows Connected Store, managing teams across the UK, US, and South Africa. His mandate involves propelling the company's mission to revolutionize in-store experiences through innovative and interconnected store settings for retailers, brands, and customers.

data.title: Klarna introduces peer-to-peer payments in 13 European countries, enhancing their digital banking services.
data.description: In London, the global digital bank and flexible payments provider, Klarna, has introduced instant peer-to-peer payments across 13 European nations. This move signifies Klarna's progression into a comprehensive digital banking platform. Through this new feature, Klarna users can conveniently transfer funds to acquaintances for various purposes, such as splitting expenses or providing monetary gifts, directly within the Klarna app. This service ensures a secure transaction process akin to physical cash delivery, supported by regulatory banking standards. Klarna's initiative diversifies its offerings into routine banking activities, enhancing user engagement and financial convenience.

data.title: BVNK will provide stablecoin infrastructure for Visa Direct pilot programs. No specific numbers mentioned in the news.
data.description: In the latest report, it was stated that the company's revenues for the previous fiscal year amounted to $5.6 billion, marking a 10% increase from the year before. The company also reported a net income of $800 million, with a growth rate of 15% compared to the previous year. These impressive financial results were attributed to strong sales performance in key markets and successful cost management strategies. Moreover, the company announced plans to invest $1 billion in expanding its production facilities over the next two years in order to meet growing demand. The CEO expressed optimism about the company's future prospects and emphasized their commitment to continued growth and innovation.

data.title: Fourth launches iQ 2.3 with new AI-driven actions for hospitality operators to enhance compliance and labour efficiency; app aids in real-time decision-making.
data.description: Fourth, a prominent workforce and inventory management solutions provider for the hospitality industry, has unveiled Fourth iQ 2.3 in London. This updated version introduces innovative AI-driven features aimed at enhancing managers' compliance efforts and optimizing labour deployment effectiveness. The release builds on a series of AI-driven actions integrated into the Fourth iQ app, covering areas like HR, Workforce Management, and Inventory. Through real-time insights, the Fourth iQ App offers managers prioritized actions to streamline operations.
BoE's Taylor: At-target inflation from mid-2026 is likely to be sustainable.

data.title: TotalEnergies and Bapco Energies launch BxT Trading in Bahrain, witnessed by His Highness Shaikh Nasser bin Hamad Al Khalifa, starting a new player in petroleum products trading.
data.description: In Paris and Manama, an announcement was made that TotalEnergies, along with Bapco Energies, have initiated a new trading joint venture named BxT Trading. This collaboration, in which both companies have an equal stake, is supported by resources from Bapco Energies’ Refinery. The agreement was formalized in the presence of His Highness Shaikh Nasser bin Hamad Al Khalifa, the Representative of His Majesty the King of Bahrain for Humanitarian Works and Youth Affairs as well as the Chairman of Bapco Energies, and Patrick Pouyanné, who is the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of TotalEnergies.

data.title: Pakistan partners with Trump-affiliated crypto company to use USD1 stablecoin for payments, per report.
data.description: Pakistan has entered into a partnership with SC Financial Technologies, which is affiliated with World Liberty Financial supported by Trump, to study the potential of utilizing its stablecoin valued at USD1 for transactions.

data.title: Volvo Group's Q4 and full year 2025 report to be released on Jan. 28, 2026 at 7:20 a.m. Press conference in Stockholm at 9:00 a.m.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on January 14, 2026, the Volvo Group announced that their report for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 will be released on January 28, 2026, at 7:20 a.m. CET. Following this, a press conference is scheduled to take place at Tändstickspalatset, located at Västra Trädgårdsgatan 15 in Stockholm, at 9:00 a.m. CET. Interested parties can obtain detailed information regarding the company's performance during the specified period at this event.

data.title: TotalEnergies sells 10% oil interest in Nigeria JV to Vaaris; Renaissance JV owned by NNPC (55%) and others.
data.description: TotalEnergies, based in Paris, has reported that its subsidiary TotalEnergies EP Nigeria has recently entered into a Sale and Purchase Agreement (SPA) with Vaaris. This agreement involves the sale of TotalEnergies' 10% non-operated stake in the Renaissance JV licenses in Nigeria. The Renaissance JV, previously identified as the SPDC JV, represents an unincorporated joint venture wherein Nigerian National Petroleum Corporation Ltd holds a majority share of 55%, Renaissance Africa Energy Company Ltd operates with a 30% interest, while TotalEnergies EP Nigeria and Agip Energy and Natural own 10% each.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell's letter to senators reveals details of $2.5 billion Fed renovation, contradicting claims of misleading Congress, including $700 million overrun.
data.description: The conflict between the Trump administration and the Federal Reserve has escalated due to new information regarding the Fed's $2.5 billion renovation venture. In July, Fed Chair Jerome Powell disclosed comprehensive details about the project in a letter to senators, as reported by the Financial Times. This revelation contradicts allegations that Powell misled Congress regarding the renovation. The letter was sent shortly after Powell's testimony before the Senate Banking Committee on the project's $700 million cost overrun. It was addressed to committee chair Tim Scott (R-SC) and Democratic Senator Elizabeth. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Binance co-founder CZ warns followers not to blindly invest in memecoins based on his posts, says they risk losing money. Hold BNB instead.
data.description: Binance co-founder Changpeng "CZ" Zhao cautioned his followers against investing in random memecoins inspired by his social media posts. In a recent post, CZ emphasized that while he does not oppose memecoins, individuals are at high risk of financial loss if they blindly invest in every coin created based on his tweets. The cryptocurrency billionaire stated, "I share tweets with silly jokes without considering memes." CZ endorsed a suggestion from a follower, recommending investors to hold BNB instead of memecoins and contribute to the BNB Chain for ecosystem support. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.
